CREATE TABLE towns (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), country VARCHAR(100), citizens INT);
CREATE TABLE cities (city_id INT PRIMARY KEY, city_name VARCHAR(100), state VARCHAR(100));
PREPARE INSERT INTO towns (name, country, citizens) VALUES (?, ?, ?);
PREPARE SELECT id, name FROM towns WHERE citizens > ?;
PREPARE UPDATE towns SET citizens = ? WHERE name = ?;
PREPARE DELETE FROM towns WHERE name = ?;
PREPARE SELECT t.id, t.name, c.city_name FROM towns t JOIN cities c ON t.name = c.city_name WHERE t.country = ?;
PREPARE SELECT name FROM towns WHERE id IN (SELECT city_id FROM cities WHERE state = ?);
PREPARE SELECT * FROM towns ORDER BY citizens DESC LIMIT ?;

PREPARE MERGE INTO towns AS t USING (SELECT ? AS name, ? AS country, ? AS citizens) AS s ON t.name = s.name WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET citizens = s.citizens WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (name, country, citizens) VALUES (s.name, s.country, s.citizens);
PREPARE SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cities WHERE state = ?) AS city_count FROM towns t;
PREPARE SELECT DISTINCT country FROM towns WHERE citizens > ? AND name LIKE ?;
PREPARE INSERT INTO cities (city_name, state) VALUES (?, ?);
PREPARE EXECUTE 1('Amsterdam', 'NL', 856124);
PREPARE EXECUTE 2(500000);
PREPARE EXECUTE 3(90000, 'Berlin');
PREPARE EXECUTE 4('NL');
PREPARE DEALLOCATE 1;
PREPARE DEALLOCATE 2;
PREPARE DEALLOCATE ALL;
